'''TasCorp''' was a [[Tasari]] company that manufactured a variety of equipment used for [[Mining/Legends|mining]]. TasCorp reached the height of its success during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="J15" />

{{Company-stub}}
